creator: info@babaei.net
text:
(In reply to Gerald Pfeifer from comment #6)

With or without CPUTYPE it fails. I originally had CPUTYPE?=corei7-avx and I was on STABLE branch. A while ago after an update it eventually broke.

My other FreeBSD installation (10.3-RELEASE) was fine. After upgrade to 11-RELEASE it fails too.
